text:
DESCRIPTION: A code used to distinguish among Medicaid, Medicaid Expansion, and Separate CHIP populations, in a 
month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: CHIP_CD_01 
CHIP_CD_02 
CHIP_CD_03 
CHIP_CD_04 
CHIP_CD_05 
CHIP_CD_06 

CHIP_CD_07 
CHIP_CD_08 
CHIP_CD_09 
CHIP_CD_10 
CHIP_CD_11 
CHIP_CD_12
